```{r usage density rate table}
#| label: tab-usage-density-rates
#| tbl-cap: "Overview over the factors influencing the infants' risk of developing an infection or acquiring a drug resistant pathogen. Usage days: The aggregated number of days the risk/protective factor was present in all infants. Pooled mean: The usage density rate calculated as usage days per 100 patient days calculated across all infants. Q1, Q2, Q3: The quartiles (25%, 50% and 75% quantiles) of the usage density rates of the partner departments"
#| tbl-cap-location: bottom

table_usage_density_rate |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Factor = dplyr::case_match(
      as.character(.data$Factor),
      "cvc" ~ "Central",
      "pvc" ~ "Peripheral",
      "vs" ~ "Any",
      "inv" ~ "Invasive",
      "niv" ~ "Non-invasive",
      "human_milk" ~ "Human milk",
      "probiotic" ~ "Probiotics",
      "kangaroo_care" ~ "Kangaroo care",
      "ab" ~ "Any antibiotic",
      "a" ~ "Access",
      "w" ~ "Watch",
      "r" ~ "Reserve")) |>
  gt(rowname_col = "Factor") |>
  fmt_number(decimals = 1) |>
  fmt_number(columns = "Usage days", decimals = 0) |>
  tab_row_group(label = "Vascular catheter", rows = 1:2, id = "grp_vc") |>
  tab_row_group(label = "Ventilatory support", rows = 3:5, id = "grp_vs") |>
  tab_row_group(label = "Other", rows = 6:8, id = "grp_othr") |>
  tab_row_group(label = "Antibiotics", rows = 9:12, id = "grp_ab") |>
  row_group_order(groups = c("grp_vc", "grp_vs", "grp_ab", "grp_othr")) |>
  tab_spanner(
    label = "Usage density rate",
    columns = c("Pooled mean","Q1","Q2","Q3"),
    id = "usage_density_rate"
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_borders(sides = c("left", "right"), weight = px(0))
    ),
    locations = list(
      cells_stub()
    )
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_text(weight = "bold"),
      cell_borders(sides = c("left", "right"), weight = px(0))
    ),
    locations = list(
      cells_column_spanners(),
      cells_column_labels()
    )
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = md(
      paste0(
        "$$\\text{",
        "Usage density rate",
        "} = \\frac{\\text{",
        "Usage days",
        "}}{\\text{",
        "Patient days",
        "}} \\times 100$$"
      )),
    locations = cells_column_spanners(spanners = "usage_density_rate")
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = "As cumulative treatment days for individual substances are recorded per patient, combination therapies using several substances on one day are counted as multiple usage days.",
    locations = gt::cells_stub(
      rows = c("Access","Watch","Reserve"))
  )
```
